G

getAddress() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the street address of the license holder.
getCity() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the city of the license holder.
getDateOfBirth() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the date of birth of the license holder.
getDateOfIssue() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the date of issue of the license.
getExpiryDate() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the expiry date of the license.
getFirstName() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the first name of the license holder.
getHeight() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the height of the license holder in centimeters.
getLastName() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the last name of the license holder.
getLicenseClass() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the class of the driver's license.
getLicenseNumber() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the license number.
getPostalCode() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the postal code of the license holder.
getProvince() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the province of the license holder.
getReferenceNumber() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the document reference number.
getRestrictions() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns any restrictions on the license.
getSex() - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Returns the sex of the license holder.
